query.help: Search for items on ModelloTurbo. Example: modello-turbo search query "my search term" --limit 20 --table modello-turbo search query "keyword" --filter "price:lt:100" modello-turbo search query "keyword" --properties "title,price"
query.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo search query` to search for items on ModelloTurbo. QUERY is required and identifies search query. --limit/-l Maximum number of results Default is 100. --filter/-f Filter results (field:op:value).

item.help: Get details for a specific item. Example: modello-turbo search item abc123 --table modello-turbo search item "https://example.com/item/abc123" modello-turbo search item abc123 --properties "title,price"
item.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo search item` to get details for a specific item. ITEM_ID is required and identifies item id or url. --table/-t Display as table. --properties/-p Comma-separated fields to include (supports dot-notation).

list.help: List items from ModelloTurbo. Example: modello-turbo search list --limit 100 --table modello-turbo search list --filter "status:active" modello-turbo search list --properties "id,name,status"
list.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo search list` to list items from ModelloTurbo. --limit/-l Maximum number of items Default is 100. --filter/-f Filter results (field:op:value).

wildcard.help: Search items with wildcard pattern matching. Supports * wildcards for pattern matching across all string fields. Browser CLIs use client-side search.
wildcard.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo search wildcard` to search items with wildcard pattern matching. Supports * wildcards for pattern matching across all string fields. Browser CLIs use client-side search. QUERY is required and identifies search query (supports * wildcards). --table/-t Display as table. --limit/-l Maximum number of results Default is 100.

search.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo search` for search modello-turbo. Main actions: `search query`, `search item`, `search list`, `search wildcard`.

login.help: Configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to save credentials to

login.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo auth login` to configure authentication credentials. Prompts for required credentials based on the tool's authentication type. For OAuth authorization code flows, opens a browser for user consent. --profile/-p Profile name to save credentials to. --force/-F Clear existing credentials and re-authenticate.

logout.help: Clear stored credentials and browser sessions.

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to clear credentials from

logout.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo auth logout` to clear stored credentials and browser sessions. --profile/-p Profile name to clear credentials from.

status.help: Check authentication status across profiles. Performs a live round-trip for every configured credential type so the report reflects ground truth — not on-disk belief. Saved credentials whose live verification fails are reported as ``authenticated: false`` with the failure reason in ``api_test`` (API/OAuth) or via the live browser check (browser_session).

options.name: --profile
options.help: Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles)

status.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo auth status` to check authentication status across profiles. --profile/-p Profile name to check (defaults to all profiles). --table/-t Display as table.

test.help: Test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles.
test.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo auth test` to test authentication by verifying credentials work across profiles. --table/-t Display as table. --verbose/-v Show detailed checks.

list.help: List all profiles and show which is the default.

options.name: --limit
options.help: Maximum number of profiles to return

options.name: --properties
options.help: Comma-separated list of fields to include

list.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo auth profiles list` to list all profiles and show which is the default. --table/-t Display as table. --limit/-l Maximum number of profiles to return.

get.help: Get details for a specific profile.

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to get details for

get.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo auth profiles get` to get details for a specific profile. NAME is required and identifies profile name to get details for. --table/-t Display as table.

create.help: Create a new profile from .env.example template.
create.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo auth profiles create` to create a new profile from .env.example template. NAME is required and identifies profile name (e.g., staging, production).

set-default.help: Set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1).

arguments.name: name
arguments.help: Profile name to set as default

set-default.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo auth profiles set-default` to set a profile as the default (IS_DEFAULT_PROFILE=1). NAME is required and identifies profile name to set as default.

delete.help: Delete a profile and its data.
delete.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo auth profiles delete` to delete a profile and its data. NAME is required and identifies profile name to delete. --force/-F Skip confirmation.

profiles.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo auth profiles` for manage authentication profiles. Main actions: `auth profiles list`, `auth profiles get`, `auth profiles create`, `auth profiles set-default`, `auth profiles delete`.

auth.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo auth` for manage modello-turbo authentication. Main actions: `auth login`, `auth logout`, `auth status`, `auth refresh`, `auth test`, `auth profiles`.

clear.help: Remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.
clear.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo cache clear` to remove all cached responses. Deletes every file in the cache directory ({storage_dir}/cache/) and reports how many files and bytes were freed.

cache.usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo cache` for manage response cache. Main actions: `cache clear`.

usage_instructions: Use `modello-turbo` for cLI interface for ModelloTurbo (browser automation). Commands follow `modello-turbo <command-group> <action>`. Primary groups are search, auth, cache.
